item.title: Review: Let My People Go Surfing
item.description: Patagonia, Inc. is quite a fascinating brand. It’s founder, Yvon Chouinard, is even more eccentric. Recently, Yvon donated the company to a non-profit trust to fight the environmental crisis1. This was a sign of Skin in the Game and I was curious to learn more about the company. After listening to a couple of Yvon’s interviews, I picked up this book. Along with Yvon’s personal story, the book also expands his guiding principles about running a business.
